title: Buying Gold and Silver
body:
O.P.
Hey team,
I'm looking to make investments into Gold and Silver and I have a few questions for those gold and silver bugs out there...
Firstly, A recommendation as to a platform or way to buy G & S that is physically backed with a strong history of audits, reputable company/website etc. I'm probably not interesting in holding the physical gold myself as I am a bit of a clumsy fella. But really like the idea of my investment being backed 1:1 by the assets so that even if the company backing it fails, my investment is still safe.
Secondly, I'm a crypto fanatic and relatively young. So i'm used to seeing 5-10% moves daily and to be honest the lack of volatility in the traditional markets kinda bores me, but definitely appreciate the strong fundamentals behind G & S, especially with this current economic situation. So I was looking to also buy some using leverage also, recommendation as to platforms that allow leveraged trades that could be held for relatively long term periods.
It would be great if you could touch on why you feel your chosen platform is better than others also.
Many thanks!!!
